name: LaunchPad - New Tab Shortcuts
description: Unlimited organized shortcuts on your new tab page. Groups, drag-and-drop, dark mode. Free and private.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; img-src 'self' https://images.unsplash.com https://*.gstatic.com https://www.google.com data: blob:; connect-src 'self' https://images.unsplash.com;
